paper_meta.Paper_title: Biotechnology Progress - 2025 - Ming - Triton CG‐110 as an alternative for cell lysis in manufacturing of adeno‐associated

protocols.Paper_title: Triton CG-110 as an alternative for cell lysis in manufacturing of adeno-associated virus-based gene therapy
protocols.Evidence: “Small-scale lysis and clarification… Fresh detergent stock solution was added… spinner flasks were kept… at 37°C during the lysis process… Air purge and filter flush were performed prior to clarification”

protocols.Paper_title: Triton CG-110 as an alternative for cell lysis in manufacturing of adeno-associated virus-based gene therapy
protocols.Evidence: “Bioreactors… Prior to harvest… Fresh detergent stock solutions were added to the bioreactor… temperature at 37°C… Then, the cell lysate was ready as the loading material for at-scale clarification.”

protocols.Paper_title: Triton CG-110 as an alternative for cell lysis in manufacturing of adeno-associated virus-based gene therapy
protocols.Evidence: “the materials were first treated… followed by heat treatment… A standard curve was prepared… qPCR… Polymerase chain reaction (PCR) was carried out…”

protocols.Paper_title: Triton CG-110 as an alternative for cell lysis in manufacturing of adeno-associated virus-based gene therapy
protocols.Evidence: “0.1% Triton X-100, 0.5% Triton CG-110, and 0.1% DDM… cell lysate… clarified… further purified by affinity chromatography… chromatograms… end of column wash”
